extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - Modernized for Kodi 21+
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 34+ scrapers across torrent sites, streaming sources, anime trackers, and international sources.
Features: - Custom source dialog with quality breakdown - Up Next: auto-play next episode for TV series - Skip Intro prompt for TV episodes - Torrent Sites: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, TPB, NNM-Club, RuTracker, RuTor, Nyaa, etc. - Jackett/Prowlarr Integration: Connect to any indexer - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox - Trakt.tv: Watchlists, collections, scrobbling, history - ResolveURL for 270+ hosting sites
Revived and modernized by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris Thank you to Mister X and Zaxxon709
extension.news:
v2.1.8 (2026) - Fixed: Source dialog rendering - moved to inline native Kodi Dialog().select() with color-coded formatting - Fixed: Eliminated external module dependency for source dialog (no more import failures) - Added: Quality color badges inline (gold 4K, green 1080p, blue 720p, purple 480p, gray SD) - Added: CACHED/FREE tags, seed health coloring, file sizes all in native dialog
v2.1.7 (2026) - Added: Bento UI Source Dialog - custom skin with quality-colored badges, cached/free tags, seeds, size - Added: Pre-Scrape hover caching - background scrape after 2s hover on movie items (4-link rule) - Added: 24hr TTL hover cache in SQLite for instant source availability - Added: "Instant!" notification when pre-scraped sources are available - Added: Clear Pre-Scrape Cache in Tools menu - Added: Fallback to standard dialog if skin XML not available
v2.1.6 (2026) - Added: Franchises menu (30 curated + search with unlimited pagination via TMDB collections) - Added: Actors menu (Popular actors with pagination + search + full filmography with pagination) - Added: 24/7 Movie Channels - pick an actor, shuffles all their movies, autoplay marathon (max 1080p) - Added: 24/7 TV Channels - pick a show, random season/episode start, plays sequentially - Added: Search for franchises, actors, and 24/7 channels
v2.1.5 (2026) - Added: TorBox debrid service support (API key auth, magnet resolve, cache check) - Added: Batch cache checking - all scraped torrents checked against debrid services in one pass - Added: [CACHED] tag and green highlighting for pre-cached sources in source dialog - Added: Debrid gate - torrent scrapers blocked until a debrid service is enabled - Added: Source sorting now prioritizes cached torrents - Fixed: Replaced all 'requests' usage with native urllib in base_scraper.py and debrid.py - Fixed: All 34+ scrapers now work (not just PirateBay) - base class urllib migration complete - Fixed: Trakt API - real CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET for proper OAuth - Fixed: Trakt lists/menus hardened for all response formats (Trending/Popular/Watchlist/Collection) - Fixed: Trakt list items now pass TMDB IDs for metadata - Removed: script.module.requests and script.module.six dependencies
v2.1.4 (2026) - Fixed: Debrid container refresh on authorisation.
v2.1.3 (2026) - Fixed: AllDebrid authorisation.
v2.1.2 (2026) - Fixed: Busy spinner on playback.
v2.1.1 (2026) - Fixed: Replaced setResolvedUrl with xbmc.Player().play() to prevent rescrape loop - Fixed: Trakt API now uses native urllib (no more requests dependency crash) - Added: Custom source dialog showing source/scraper count and quality breakdown - Added: Up Next - auto-play next episode for TV series - Added: Skip Intro prompt during first 90 seconds of TV episodes - Removed: repository.gujal from repo
v2.1.0 (2026) - Added 34+ scrapers including Russian, Chinese, Anime sources - Fixed TMDB integration with native urllib
v2.0.0 (2026) - Complete rewrite for Kodi 21+ (Python 3) - Added modern torrent scrapers - Added Jackett integration - Added Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid support
